description: Calculate the hydraulic properties for the most upstream cross-section in the Muncie HEC-RAS project by parsing the geometry data (Muncie.g04 or HDF). Identify the cross-section with the highest River Station value and compute hydraulic properties at 0.5-ft elevation increments from the thalweg to the maximum ground elevation. Export a CSV file to /home/ga/Documents/hec_ras_results/hydraulic_properties.csv containing columns for Elevation_ft, Area_sqft, WettedPerimeter_ft, HydraulicRadius_ft, and TopWidth_ft. Save a summary text file to /home/ga/Documents/hec_ras_results/cross_section_summary.txt including the River Station identifier, the count of station
